data.title: ASL Marine Announces Additional Interest Payment on Series 006 Notes
data.description:
ASL Marine Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:A04) ) has provided an update.

ASL Marine Holdings Ltd. announced the payment of additional interest on its Series 006 Notes, part of its S$500 million multicurrency debt issuance program. The additional interest rate of 1.5% per annum is based on the company’s Adjusted Core EBITDA for FY2024, which exceeded the threshold by S$10 million. This financial maneuver reflects the company’s robust financial performance and its commitment to fulfilling obligations to noteholders, potentially enhancing its reputation in the financial markets.

More about ASL Marine Holdings Ltd.

ASL Marine Holdings Ltd., incorporated in Singapore, operates within the marine industry. The company is involved in shipbuilding, ship repair, and other marine-related services, focusing on providing solutions for the maritime sector.

YTD Price Performance: -1.67%

Average Trading Volume: 754,832

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: S$57.3M

data.title: Jianzhong Construction Receives Additional Resumption Guidance from HKEX
data.description:
Jianzhong Construction Development Limited ( (HK:0589) ) has shared an update.

Jianzhong Construction Development Limited has received additional resumption guidance from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, which includes publishing outstanding financial results, addressing audit modifications, and conducting an independent investigation into undisclosed related party transactions. The company is required to demonstrate compliance with listing rules and ensure adequate internal controls before resuming trading of its shares. The company is actively working to meet these requirements and will provide updates to shareholders and investors as progress is made.

More about Jianzhong Construction Development Limited

Jianzhong Construction Development Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily operating in the construction industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on construction development and related services.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$118.7M

data.title: MicroPort NeuroScientific Schedules Board Meeting for Financial Results and Dividend Consideration
data.description:
The latest update is out from MicroPort NeuroTech Limited ( (HK:2172) ).

MicroPort NeuroScientific Corporation has announced a board meeting scheduled for March 26, 2025, to discuss and approve the company’s final financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The meeting will also consider the potential payment of a final dividend and address other business matters, which may impact the company’s financial strategy and shareholder returns.

More about MicroPort NeuroTech Limited

MicroPort NeuroScientific Corporation, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the medical technology industry, focusing on neurological scientific advancements and solutions.

data.title: Bourse Direct Enhances Investor Knowledge with Free Webinars
data.description:
Bourse Direct SA ( (FR:BSD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bourse Direct is hosting a series of free webinars during Financial Education Week to enhance investor knowledge in stock market and wealth management. Led by Christian Sanson, these sessions aim to empower both novice and experienced investors with the skills needed for confident investing, highlighting the company’s commitment to financial education.

Bourse Direct is a major player in the online stock trading industry in France, offering comprehensive online brokerage services. The company provides competitive rates and advanced technology to optimize portfolio management, and its shares are listed on Euronext.

data.title: Aztech Global Secures Dongguan Land Lease Until 2028
data.description:
Aztech Global Ltd. ( (SG:8AZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Aztech Global Ltd. announced that the lease for its factory buildings and land in Dongguan, China, will remain unaffected until March 2028, eliminating any risk of demolition. This update provides stability for the company’s operations in the region and reassures stakeholders about the security of their assets in Dongguan.

More about Aztech Global Ltd.

Aztech Global Ltd. is a company incorporated in Singapore, operating in various sectors with a focus on manufacturing and technology solutions.

data.title: Liaoning Port Co., Ltd. Updates on Legal Proceedings Involving Subsidiary
data.description:
Liaoning Port Company Limited Class H ( (HK:2880) ) has provided an update.

Liaoning Port Co., Ltd. has announced the progress of several lawsuits involving its subsidiary, DCT Logistics Co., Ltd. The company is involved in nine cases, acting as the plaintiff in one and the defendant in eight, with a total amount of RMB1.06 billion at stake. The outcomes of these cases remain uncertain as some have yet to reach a conclusive judgment. The potential impact on the company’s financial performance is currently undetermined.

More about Liaoning Port Company Limited Class H

Liaoning Port Co., Ltd. is a sino-foreign joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China. It operates in the logistics and port industry, focusing on warehousing services through its subsidiary, DCT Logistics Co., Ltd.

data.title: Arrow Minerals Director Increases Stake Through Share Acquisition
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Arrow Minerals Limited ( (AU:AMD) ).

Arrow Minerals Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, with Chris Tuckwell acquiring 657,895 ordinary shares through a placement. This acquisition increases Tuckwell’s indirect holding in the company, potentially strengthening his influence and aligning with the company’s strategic growth objectives.

More about Arrow Minerals Limited

Arrow Minerals Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is involved in the acquisition and management of mining assets, aiming to enhance its portfolio and market presence.
